summary: Full backend + frontend regression for RosterSync MVP. Backend pytest: 21/21 passed (auth, users/me, roster algorithm incl. Monday-anchor Friday-wraparound + fortnight rotation, admin RBAC). Frontend UI: register, PIN pad login, Today card, Roster 2-week grid + prev/next fortnight nav, Settings update, Admin tab visibility (hidden for non-admin, visible for admin, user modal opens with roster grid), session persistence via AsyncStorage. All working. No critical issues.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: on_event('startup'/'shutdown') is deprecated in FastAPI; consider migrating to lifespan context manager (non-blocking, works today).
PIN hashing uses SHA-256+pepper (fast). For a production app, prefer a slow KDF (bcrypt/argon2) to resist offline brute-force of a 4-digit PIN. Acceptable for MVP.

compute_day_status: silent fallback to 'regular' when anchor weekday not in working_days (line 153-155) — register/update endpoints already validate this, so the branch is dead code; leaving it defensive is fine.
Console warning observed: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' — originates from a dependency (Ionicons/react-native-web), non-blocking.
seed_data_creation: Registered 4 test users via API + 2 via UI (TEST Worker, TEST Admin, TEST Wrap, UI TestWorker, UI TestAdmin, plus dupe attempts). All prefixed TEST_/UI to be identifiable. Not cleaned up between runs (users collection persists).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Random 4-digit PINs used to avoid collisions. Admin visibility toggled via testID='switch-admin' before submit. Roster grid testIDs w1-day-<YYYY-MM-DD> / w2-day-<YYYY-MM-DD> confirmed working. When testing logout->login flows, note that Expo router keeps stale screens in DOM briefly — use `.first` or wait_for_url patterns.
